tEn: Generative Multimodal Models are In-Context Learners
tZh: 生成式多模态模型是上下文学习者
sEn: Scaling up generative multimodal models significantly enhances their task-agnostic in-context learning abilities.
sZh: 扩大生成式多模态模型的规模能显著提升其任务无关的上下文学习能力。
absEn: The human ability to easily solve multimodal tasks in context (i.e., with only a few demonstrations or simple instructions), is what current multimodal systems have largely struggled to imitate. In this work, we demonstrate that the task-agnostic in-context learning capabilities of large multimodal models can be significantly enhanced by effective scaling-up. We introduce Emu2, a generative multimodal model with 37 billion parameters, trained on large-scale multimodal sequences with a unified autoregressive objective. Emu2 exhibits strong multimodal in-context learning abilities, even emerging to solve tasks that require on-the-fly reasoning, such as visual prompting and object-grounded generation. The model sets a new record on multiple multimodal understanding tasks in few-shot settings. When instruction-tuned to follow specific instructions, Emu2 further achieves new state-of-the-art on challenging tasks such as question answering benchmarks for large multimodal models and open-ended subject-driven generation. These achievements demonstrate that Emu2 can serve as a base model and general-purpose interface for a wide range of multimodal tasks. Code and models are publicly available to facilitate future research.
absZh: 人类能够轻松地在上下文中（即仅凭少量示例或简单指令）解决多模态任务，而当前的多模态系统在很大程度上难以模仿这一点。在这项工作中，我们证明了通过有效扩展规模，可以显著增强大型多模态模型的与任务无关的上下文学习能力。我们引入了Emu2，一个拥有370亿参数的生成式多模态模型，在大型多模态序列上使用统一的自回归目标进行训练。Emu2展现出强大的多模态上下文学习能力，甚至能够解决需要即时推理的任务，如视觉提示和基于对象的生成。该模型在少样本设置下的多个多模态理解任务上创下了新纪录。当通过指令微调以遵循特定指令时，Emu2在具有挑战性的任务上进一步达到了新的最先进水平，例如大型多模态模型的问答基准和开放式的主题驱动生成。这些成就表明，Emu2可以作为广泛多模态任务的基础模型和通用接口。代码和模型已公开，以促进未来的研究。

contrib.en: Introduces Emu2, a 37B parameter generative multimodal model trained with a unified autoregressive objective on large-scale multimodal sequences.
contrib.zh: 提出Emu2，一个370亿参数的生成式多模态模型，通过统一的自回归目标在大规模多模态序列上训练。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that scaling up generative multimodal models significantly enhances task-agnostic in-context learning abilities, including visual prompting and object-grounded generation.
contrib.zh: 证明规模扩张能显著增强生成式多模态模型的任务无关上下文学习能力，包括视觉提示和对象锚定生成。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art few-shot performance on multiple multimodal understanding benchmarks, such as VQAv2 and OKVQA.
contrib.zh: 在多个多模态理解基准（如VQAv2和OKVQA）上取得少样本最优性能。

contrib.en: After instruction tuning, Emu2-Chat sets new records on LMM benchmarks like MM-Vet and TouchStone, surpassing prior public models.
contrib.zh: 经指令微调后，Emu2-Chat在MM-Vet和TouchStone等LMM基准上创下新纪录，超越此前公开模型。

contrib.en: Emu2-Gen enables controllable visual generation in context, excelling in subject-driven generation and multi-entity composition.
contrib.zh: Emu2-Gen支持上下文中的可控视觉生成，在主题驱动生成和多实体组合方面表现优异。

contrib.en: Provides publicly available code and models to facilitate future research in multimodal in-context learning.
contrib.zh: 公开代码和模型，以促进多模态上下文学习的未来研究。

limits.en: In-context learning may fail in complex scenes, e.g., counting in a crowd.
limits.zh: 上下文学习在复杂场景（如人群计数）中可能失败。

limits.en: Question-answering capability still lags behind closed multimodal systems like GPT-4V.
limits.zh: 问答能力仍落后于GPT-4V等封闭多模态系统。

limits.en: Potential for generating harmful or biased content due to biases in training data.
limits.zh: 由于训练数据中的偏见，可能生成有害或有偏见的内容。

limits.en: Model hallucination may cause incorrect predictions in certain cases.
limits.zh: 模型幻觉可能导致某些情况下的错误预测。

limits.en: Performance gap remains in tasks requiring fine-grained reasoning or high-resolution understanding.
limits.zh: 在需要细粒度推理或高分辨率理解的任务中仍存在性能差距。

items.en: The human ability to easily solve multimodal tasks in context (i.e., with only a few demonstrations or simple instructions), is what current multimodal systems have largely struggled to imitate. In this work, we demonstrate that the task-agnostic in-context learning capabilities of large multimodal models can be significantly enhanced by effective scaling-up. We introduce Emu2, a generative multimodal model with 37 billion parameters, trained on large-scale multimodal sequences with a unified autoregressive objective. Emu2 exhibits strong multimodal in-context learning abilities, even emerging to solve tasks that require on-the-fly reasoning, such as visual prompting and object-grounded generation. The model sets a new record on multiple multimodal understanding tasks in few-shot settings. When instruction-tuned to follow specific instructions, Emu2 further achieves new state-of-the-art on challenging tasks such as question answering benchmarks for large multimodal models and open-ended subject-driven generation. These achievements demonstrate that Emu2 can serve as a base model and general-purpose interface for a wide range of multimodal tasks. Code and models are publicly available to facilitate future research.
items.zh: 人类在上下文中轻松解决多模态任务的能力（即仅需少量演示或简单指令）是当前多模态系统难以模仿的。在这项工作中，我们证明了通过有效的规模扩张可以显著增强大型多模态模型的与任务无关的上下文学习能力。我们介绍了Emu2，一个拥有370亿参数的生成式多模态模型，在大型多模态序列上使用统一的自回归目标进行训练。Emu2展现出强大的多模态上下文学习能力，甚至能够解决需要即时推理的任务，如视觉提示和基于对象的生成。该模型在多个多模态理解任务的少样本设置中创下了新纪录。当通过指令微调来遵循特定指令时，Emu2在具有挑战性的任务上进一步取得了新的最先进成果，例如大型多模态模型的问答基准和开放式的主题驱动生成。这些成就表明Emu2可以作为基础模型和通用接口，用于广泛的多模态任务。代码和模型已公开，以促进未来的研究。

items.en: Multimodal tasks [42, 26] encompass anything involving understanding and generation in single or multiple modalities [5, 59, 20], which can be highly diverse and long-tail. Previous multimodal systems largely rely on designing task-specific architecture and collecting a sizable supervised training set, both of which are difficult to scale, particularly when this process needs to be repeated for each new task encountered. By contrast, humans can solve a new task in context, i.e., with only a few demonstrations or simple instructions – a capability that current multimodal models have yet to learn.
items.zh: 多模态任务[42, 26]涵盖涉及单一或多模态的理解与生成的任何内容[5, 59, 20]，这些任务可能高度多样且长尾。先前的多模态系统主要依赖于设计特定任务的架构和收集大规模监督训练集，这两者都难以扩展，尤其是当每个新任务都需要重复这一过程时。相比之下，人类可以在上下文中解决新任务，即仅需少量演示或简单指令——这是当前多模态模型尚未学会的能力。

items.en: Recently, generative pretrained language models have demonstrated strong in-context learning abilities [12, 74, 22]. By training a 37-billion-parameter model Emu2 and thoroughly evaluating it on diverse multimodal tasks, we demonstrate that a scaled-up multimodal generative pretrained model can harness similar in-context learning abilities and effectively generalize to unseen multimodal tasks. Emu2 is trained with a unified autoregressive objective: predict-the-next-multimodal-element (either visual embeddings or textual tokens). In this unified generative pretraining process, large-scale multimodal sequences (e.g., text, image-text pairs, and interleaved image-text-video) are used for model training.
items.zh: 最近，生成式预训练语言模型展示了强大的上下文学习能力[12, 74, 22]。通过训练一个370亿参数的模型Emu2并在多样化的多模态任务上进行全面评估，我们证明了扩展规模的多模态生成式预训练模型能够利用类似的上下文学习能力，并有效泛化到未见过的多模态任务。Emu2使用统一的自回归目标进行训练：预测下一个多模态元素（视觉嵌入或文本标记）。在这个统一的生成式预训练过程中，大规模多模态序列（例如文本、图像-文本对和交错图像-文本-视频）被用于模型训练。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Emu2 is a large generative multimodal model that serves as a foundation and a general-purpose interface for a broad range of multimodal tasks across understanding and generation, with remarkable in-context learning abilities.
items.capZh: 图1：Emu2是一个大型生成式多模态模型，作为基础和通用接口，用于广泛的理解和生成多模态任务，具有卓越的上下文学习能力。

items.en: We measure Emu2’s capabilities of learning from a few examples or instructions on standard multimodal datasets, as well as new tasks unseen in the training set. Specifically, Emu2 is evaluated under two scenarios: (a)𝑎(a) few-shot setting, where we allow as many examples as possible to fit the context window of the model; and (b)𝑏(b) instruction tuning, where the model is tuned to follow specific instructions.
items.zh: 我们衡量了Emu2从少量示例或指令中学习的能力，在标准多模态数据集以及训练集中未见的新任务上。具体来说，Emu2在两种场景下进行评估：(a) 少样本设置，我们允许尽可能多的示例以适应模型的上下文窗口；(b) 指令微调，模型被微调以遵循特定指令。

items.en: Emu2 achieves promising results in the few-shot setting on a wide range of vision-language tasks. For example, it demonstrates state-of-the-art few-shot performance on multiple visual question-answering datasets. We observe a performance improvement when the number of examples in context increases. Figure 1 illustrates Emu2’s strong multimodal reasoning capabilities for tasks in the wild, e.g., recognition and counting in a specific format. Emu2 also learns to follow visual prompting in context (e.g., the circles laid on the images in Figure 1), even although it struggles at a smaller scale or at zero shot.
items.zh: Emu2在广泛的视觉-语言任务的少样本设置中取得了有希望的结果。例如，它在多个视觉问答数据集上展示了最先进的少样本性能。我们观察到，随着上下文中示例数量的增加，性能有所提升。图1展示了Emu2在野外任务中的强大多模态推理能力，例如以特定格式进行识别和计数。Emu2还学会了在上下文中遵循视觉提示（例如图1中图像上的圆圈），尽管在较小规模或零样本情况下它表现不佳。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Overview of Emu2 architecture. Emu2 learns with a predict-the-next-element objective in multimodality. Each image in the multimodal sequence is tokenized into embeddings via a visual encoder, and then interleaved with text tokens for autoregressive modeling. The regressed visual embeddings will be decoded into an image or a video by a visual decoder.
items.capZh: 图2：Emu2架构概览。Emu2在多模态中学习预测下一个元素的目标。多模态序列中的每个图像通过视觉编码器被标记化为嵌入，然后与文本标记交错以进行自回归建模。回归的视觉嵌入将由视觉解码器解码为图像或视频。

items.en: As Emu2 is inherently equipped to handle interleaved text-image-video at both input and output, it serves as a powerful and versatile base model for diverse multimodal tasks, by following specific task instructions. For example, after instruct tuning with conversational data, Emu2 achieves state-of-the-art results on visual question-answering tasks, and surpasses previous models of more complex designs. In addition, Emu2 can be fine-tuned to function as a controllable visual generation model of high quality. It is capable of accepting a mixture of text, locations and images as conditions, and generating images that are grounded as specified.
items.zh: 由于Emu2天生具备处理输入和输出中交错文本-图像-视频的能力，它通过遵循特定任务指令，成为多样化多模态任务的强大且通用的基础模型。例如，在使用对话数据进行指令微调后，Emu2在视觉问答任务上取得了最先进的结果，并超越了先前设计更复杂的模型。此外，Emu2可以微调为高质量的可控视觉生成模型。它能够接受文本、位置和图像的混合作为条件，并生成指定条件的图像。

items.en: Given the broad spectrum of capabilities displayed by Emu2, we conduct a thorough analysis of its potential societal implications and discuss in detail potential concerns over misuse. By identifying further tasks where Emu2’s in-context learning can further improve, we highlight the necessity for continuous enhancement of the model and the importance of deploying Emu2 responsibly.
items.zh: 鉴于Emu2展示的广泛能力，我们对其潜在的社会影响进行了彻底分析，并详细讨论了潜在的滥用问题。通过识别Emu2的上下文学习可以进一步改进的任务，我们强调了持续增强模型的重要性以及负责任地部署Emu2的必要性。

items.en: Emu2 is a generative multimodal model that learns with a predict-the-next-element objective in multimodal context. As illustrated in 2, the architecture of Emu2 consists of three components: Visual Encoder, Multimodal Modeling, and Visual Decoder. Each image in the input multimodal sequence is tokenized into continuous embeddings via the Visual Encoder and then interleaved with text tokens for autoregressive Multimodal Modeling. The regressed visual embeddings are then decoded into an image or a video by the Visual Decoder. Specifically, we leverage pretrained EVA-02-CLIP-E-plus [71], LLaMA-33B [74] and SDXL [59] to initialize the Visual Encoder, Multimodal Modeling, and Visual Decoder, respectively. Compared to Emu [72], Emu2 embraces a simpler framework which connects the Visual Encoder and Multimodal Modeling through mean pooling each image to 8×8888\times 8 image patches, followed by a linear projection, instead of using an additional C-Former [72].
items.zh: Emu2是一个生成式多模态模型，在多模态上下文中学习预测下一个元素的目标。如图2所示，Emu2的架构由三个组件组成：视觉编码器、多模态建模和视觉解码器。输入多模态序列中的每个图像通过视觉编码器被标记化为连续嵌入，然后与文本标记交错以进行自回归多模态建模。回归的视觉嵌入随后由视觉解码器解码为图像或视频。具体来说，我们利用预训练的EVA-02-CLIP-E-plus [71]、LLaMA-33B [74]和SDXL [59]分别初始化视觉编码器、多模态建模和视觉解码器。与Emu [72]相比，Emu2采用更简单的框架，通过将每个图像平均池化为8×8图像块，然后进行线性投影来连接视觉编码器和多模态建模，而不是使用额外的C-Former [72]。

items.en: The pretraining data for Emu2 comprises several publicly accessible datasets, including image-text pairs from LAION-2B [66] and CapsFusion-120M [88], video-text pairs from WebVid-10M [8], interleaved image-text data from Multimodal-C4 (MMC4) [96], interleaved video-text data from YT-Storyboard-1B [72], grounded image-text pairs from GRIT-20M introduced by Kosmos-2 [58] and CapsFusion-grounded-100M curated by CapsFusion-120M. Additionally, language-only data from Pile [27] is included to retain textual reasoning capability.
items.zh: Emu2的预训练数据包括多个公开可访问的数据集，包括来自LAION-2B [66]和CapsFusion-120M [88]的图像-文本对、来自WebVid-10M [8]的视频-文本对、来自Multimodal-C4 (MMC4) [96]的交错图像-文本数据、来自YT-Storyboard-1B [72]的交错视频-文本数据、来自Kosmos-2 [58]引入的GRIT-20M的基于对象的图像-文本对，以及由CapsFusion-120M整理的CapsFusion-grounded-100M。此外，还包括来自Pile [27]的纯语言数据，以保持文本推理能力。

items.en: Similar to Emu [72], Emu2 learns with the predict-the-next-element objective within a multimodal sequence. Each image is encoded into N=64𝑁64N=64 dimension-fixed visual embeddings and then interleaved with text tokens to construct a multimodal sequence. The interleaved sequence is then fed into a Transformer decoder for autoregressive modeling.
items.zh: 与Emu [72]类似，Emu2在多模态序列中学习预测下一个元素的目标。每个图像被编码为N=64个维度固定的视觉嵌入，然后与文本标记交错以构建多模态序列。交错序列随后被输入到Transformer解码器进行自回归建模。

items.en: Emu2 is first pretrained on image-text and video-text pair data with only captioning loss on the text tokens. The input images are resized to 224×224224224224\times 224. We adopt the AdamW optimizer [51] with β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.95subscript𝛽20.95\beta_{2}=0.95, ϵ=1×10−6italic-ϵ1superscript106\epsilon=1\times 10^{-6}. The maximum learning rate is 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4} for the linear projection layer, 3×10−53superscript1053\times 10^{-5} for Multimodel Modeling, and 5×10−55superscript1055\times 10^{-5} for Visual Encoder. We pretrain Emu2 on 162 million image-text samples and 7 million video-text samples for 35,200 iterations. The global batch size is 6,144 for the image-text pairs and 768 for video-text pairs. The training process is then restarted at a higher 448-pixel resolution for an additional 4,000 iterations.
items.zh: Emu2首先在图像-文本和视频-文本对数据上进行预训练，仅对文本标记使用字幕损失。输入图像被调整为224×224。我们采用AdamW优化器[51]，参数为β1=0.9，β2=0.95，ϵ=1×10^{-6}。线性投影层的最大学习率为1×10^{-4}，多模态建模为3×10^{-5}，视觉编码器为5×10^{-5}。我们在1.62亿个图像-文本样本和700万个视频-文本样本上预训练Emu2，共35,200次迭代。图像-文本对的全局批大小为6,144，视频-文本对为768。然后，训练过程以更高的448像素分辨率重新开始，额外进行4,000次迭代。

items.en: Then, we freeze the Visual Encoder and only optimize the linear projection layer and Multimodel Modeling with both text classification loss and image regression loss. Additional datasets including image-text interleaved data, video-text interleaved data, grounded image-text pair data, and language-only data are used in the training. All images are resized to 448×448448448448\times 448, and the maximum learning rate is 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5}. We use a global batch size of 12,800 for image-text pair data, 6,400 for video-text pair data, 3,200 for image-text and video-text interleaved data, and 800 for language-only data. The training process spans 20,350 iterations and consumes about 160 million samples of image-text data and 3.8B tokens of language-only data.
items.zh: 然后，我们冻结视觉编码器，仅优化线性投影层和多模态建模，同时使用文本分类损失和图像回归损失。训练中使用了额外的数据集，包括图像-文本交错数据、视频-文本交错数据、基于对象的图像-文本对数据和纯语言数据。所有图像被调整为448×448，最大学习率为1×10^{-5}。我们使用图像-文本对数据的全局批大小为12,800，视频-文本对数据为6,400，图像-文本和视频-文本交错数据为3,200，纯语言数据为800。训练过程持续20,350次迭代，消耗约1.6亿个图像-文本数据样本和38亿个纯语言数据标记。

items.en: We train the Visual Decoder to directly decode visual embeddings generated by the Visual Encoder into image. We use SDXL-base[59] as the initialization of our Visual Decoder, which is fully trained to solve the new task of autoencoding. Specifically, we use N𝑁N visual embeddings as the condition input to the Visual Decoder and adjust the dimension of the projection layers in cross-attention modules to match the dimension of visual embeddings.
items.zh: 我们训练视觉解码器直接将视觉编码器生成的视觉嵌入解码为图像。我们使用SDXL-base [59]作为视觉解码器的初始化，并对其进行完全训练以解决自动编码的新任务。具体来说，我们使用N个视觉嵌入作为视觉解码器的条件输入，并调整交叉注意力模块中投影层的维度以匹配视觉嵌入的维度。

items.en: Unlike Emu [72] where each optimization step of its Visual Decoder requires an autoregressive inference of the language model, Emu2’s visual decoding can be considered as training a detokenizer, which can be trained off-the-shelf without the language model. Once trained, the Visual Decoder together with the Visual Encoder works as an image autoencoder that can tokenize an image into embeddings and detokenize back. During Emu2 inference, it generates N𝑁N image embeddings and decodes to an image on the fly.
items.zh: 与Emu [72]不同，Emu的视觉解码器每个优化步骤都需要语言模型的自回归推理，而Emu2的视觉解码可以视为训练一个去标记器，可以在没有语言模型的情况下离线训练。一旦训练完成，视觉解码器与视觉编码器一起作为一个图像自动编码器，可以将图像标记化为嵌入并解码回来。在Emu2推理过程中，它生成N个图像嵌入并即时解码为图像。

items.en: For the decoding of video data, we train a diffusion-based decoder [68]. Similar to [75, 47], we adapt a 2D denoising U-Net to 3D style by inserting a 1D temporal convolution following each 2D spatial convolutional layer and extending the spatial attention to spatial-temporal attention. This video decoder is initialized via Stable Diffusion 2.1 [63] and fully trained to generate video clips conditioned on visual embeddings from Emu2.
items.zh: 对于视频数据的解码，我们训练了一个基于扩散的解码器[68]。类似于[75, 47]，我们通过在每个2D空间卷积层之后插入1D时间卷积，并将空间注意力扩展为时空注意力，将2D去噪U-Net调整为3D风格。该视频解码器通过Stable Diffusion 2.1 [63]初始化，并完全训练以生成以Emu2视觉嵌入为条件的视频片段。

items.en: Training Setup. We use the images in LAION-COCO [2] and LAION-Aesthetics [1] to train the Visual Decoder under the task of image autoencoding. The Visual Encoder and VAE in SDXL are frozen, and only the U-Net is updated during training. We adopt AdamW optimizer [51] with β1=0.9,β2=0.999formulae-sequencesubscript𝛽10.9subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{1}=0.9,\beta_{2}=0.999 and the weight decay of 0.01. We use l​o​g𝑙𝑜𝑔log learning rate warm-up and linear learning rate decay with a peak learning rate of 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4} for 2,000 and 6,000 steps, respectively. We filter out images whose resolution is lower than 512×512512512512\times 512. The input to the Visual Encoder is set to 448×448448448448\times 448, while the output of the Visual Decoder is set to 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024. We also employ the classifier-free guidance [31], which randomly discards image embeddings with the probability of 10%percent1010\%. The batch size is set to 2,048 in total.
items.zh: 训练设置。我们使用LAION-COCO [2]和LAION-Aesthetics [1]中的图像在图像自动编码任务下训练视觉解码器。视觉编码器和SDXL中的VAE被冻结，训练期间仅更新U-Net。我们采用AdamW优化器[51]，参数为β1=0.9，β2=0.999，权重衰减为0.01。我们使用对数学习率预热和线性学习率衰减，峰值学习率为1×10^{-4}，分别持续2,000步和6,000步。我们过滤掉分辨率低于512×512的图像。视觉编码器的输入设置为448×448，而视觉解码器的输出设置为1024×1024。我们还采用了无分类器引导[31]，以10%的概率随机丢弃图像嵌入。总批大小设置为2,048。

items.en: Emu2 can be efficiently aligned to follow specific task instructions. We fine-tune the base model with conversational data to yield Emu2-Chat, which is capable of following multimodal questions and making responses in dialogue. Similarly, we derive a controllable visual generation model Emu2-Gen, which is capable of accepting a mix of text, locations, and images as conditions, and generating images that are grounded in the specified text or subject.
items.zh: Emu2可以高效地对齐以遵循特定任务指令。我们使用对话数据对基础模型进行微调，得到Emu2-Chat，它能够遵循多模态问题并在对话中做出回应。类似地，我们推导出一个可控的视觉生成模型Emu2-Gen，它能够接受文本、位置和图像的混合作为条件，并生成基于指定文本或主题的图像。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparison of autoencoding results among different methods [28, 72]. Emu2’s Visual Encoder and Visual Decoder in the architecture of CLIP-Diffusers form a strong autoencoder.
items.capZh: 图3：不同方法[28, 72]的自动编码结果比较。Emu2的视觉编码器和视觉解码器在CLIP-Diffusers架构中形成了一个强大的自动编码器。

items.en: Training Data. We adopt a uniform approach to train on both academic-task-oriented datasets and multimodal chat data to empower Emu2-Chat with the instruction-following ability while retaining rich visual knowledge. As academic-task-oriented datasets have brief annotations that limit the model’s capacity to provide more comprehensive and helpful responses, we distinguish between these two data categories by employing different system messages and including instructions with output-format control information as used in [49]. A summary of data used is as follows: (a)𝑎(a) Academic-task-oriented data: image captioning [19, 67], visual question answering [29, 33, 69], knowledgeable question answering [54, 52], multimodal classification [46], and referring expression comprehension [35, 53]. (b)𝑏(b) Multimodal chat data: GPT-assisted visual instruction [50, 94], language instruction [4, 73], clock reading [84], and video chat [45].
items.zh: 训练数据。我们采用统一的方法，在学术任务导向数据集和多模态聊天数据上进行训练，以使 Emu2-Chat 具备指令跟随能力，同时保留丰富的视觉知识。由于学术任务导向数据集的标注简短，限制了模型提供更全面和有用回答的能力，我们通过使用不同的系统消息并包含如 [49] 中使用的输出格式控制信息的指令来区分这两类数据。所用数据总结如下：(a) 学术任务导向数据：图像描述 [19, 67]、视觉问答 [29, 33, 69]、知识问答 [54, 52]、多模态分类 [46] 和指代表达理解 [35, 53]。(b) 多模态聊天数据：GPT 辅助的视觉指令 [50, 94]、语言指令 [4, 73]、时钟读取 [84] 和视频聊天 [45]。

items.en: Training Objective. In instruction tuning of Emu2-Chat, two special tokens, [USER] and [ASSISTANT], are incorporated into the model to denote roles. These tokens help organize different data types in the following format: “<Sys.Msg.> [USER]: <Instruction> [ASSISTANT]: <Answer>”. Here <Sys.Msg.> represents system message and varies between the two major task categories (academic-task-oriented and multimodal chat). The <Instruction> section comprises multimodal tokens, including images, videos, and text. Only tokens in the <Answer> section will be supervised by cross-entropy loss during training.
items.zh: 训练目标。在 Emu2-Chat 的指令微调中，模型引入了两个特殊标记 [USER] 和 [ASSISTANT] 来表示角色。这些标记有助于按以下格式组织不同类型的数据：“<Sys.Msg.> [USER]: <Instruction> [ASSISTANT]: <Answer>”。其中 <Sys.Msg.> 表示系统消息，在两大任务类别（学术任务导向和多模态聊天）之间有所不同。<Instruction> 部分包含多模态标记，包括图像、视频和文本。训练期间，仅 <Answer> 部分中的标记会通过交叉熵损失进行监督。

items.en: Training Setup. We use a global batch size of 768 and train for 8k steps. The learning rate linearly warms up to 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5} in the first 100 steps, then decays to zero with a cosine schedule. The model is trained using the AdamW optimizer with β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.98subscript𝛽20.98\beta_{2}=0.98, ϵ=1×10−6italic-ϵ1superscript106\epsilon=1\times 10^{-6}, and a gradient clipping of 5.0. The sequence length during training is limited to 2048, and any excess beyond that is truncated directly. We consistently employed an input image/video resolution of 448 ×\times 448. For video data, we uniformly sample frames in time as input to the model. The number of sampled frames for each video is randomly chosen from 8, 12, and 16. To capture more intricate spatial details, following the visual encoder stage, we apply mean-pooling to each static image, dividing it into 16 ×\times 16 tokens during instruction fine-tuning. This differs from the pre-training phase, where 8 ×\times 8 tokens were utilized.
items.zh: 训练设置。我们使用全局批次大小为 768，训练 8k 步。学习率在前 100 步线性预热至 1×10⁻⁵，然后通过余弦调度衰减至零。模型使用 AdamW 优化器训练，参数为 β₁=0.9，β₂=0.98，ϵ=1×10⁻⁶，梯度裁剪为 5.0。训练时的序列长度限制为 2048，超出部分直接截断。我们一致使用输入图像/视频分辨率为 448×448。对于视频数据，我们均匀采样时间帧作为模型输入。每个视频的采样帧数从 8、12 和 16 中随机选择。为了捕捉更精细的空间细节，在视觉编码器阶段之后，我们对每个静态图像应用均值池化，在指令微调期间将其划分为 16×16 个标记。这与预训练阶段使用的 8×8 标记不同。

items.en: Training Data. We leverage a mix of high-quality datasets to unleash the potential of controllable generation in context. We use a grounded image-text pair dataset CapsFusion-grounded-100M and GRIT [58] for grounded text-to-image generation. To mitigate the impact of image backgrounds on the effectiveness of multi-entity subject-driven generation, we employ SAM [37] to preprocess the grounding data, yielding a subset of approximately 5 million samples with segmentation results. Additionally, we leverage InstructPix2Pix constructed by [11] for image editing tasks. For the text-to-image task, we use a filtered subset of CapsFusion [88], LAION-Aesthetics [1], SA-1B [37], and LAION-High-Resolution [3].
items.zh: 训练数据。我们利用高质量数据集的混合来释放上下文中可控生成的潜力。我们使用基于图像-文本对的数据集 CapsFusion-grounded-100M 和 GRIT [58] 进行基于文本到图像生成。为了减轻图像背景对多实体主体驱动生成效果的影响，我们使用 SAM [37] 对基础数据进行预处理，得到约 500 万个带有分割结果的子集。此外，我们利用 [11] 构建的 InstructPix2Pix 进行图像编辑任务。对于文本到图像任务，我们使用 CapsFusion [88]、LAION-Aesthetics [1]、SA-1B [37] 和 LAION-High-Resolution [3] 的过滤子集。

items.en: We also collect data from premium sources (e.g., Unsplash [21]) and outputs from advanced text-to-image systems (e.g., Midjourney-V5 [55] and DALL-E-3 [10]) for quality fine-tuning. This diverse dataset includes around 500k high-quality image-text pairs. For all the data above, during the training, only samples with image resolutions higher than 448×448448448448\times 448 were retained to ensure generation quality. More details can be found in the supplementary.
items.zh: 我们还从优质来源（例如 Unsplash [21]）和先进文本到图像系统的输出（例如 Midjourney-V5 [55] 和 DALL-E-3 [10]）收集数据，用于质量微调。这个多样化数据集包含约 50 万对高质量图像-文本对。对于上述所有数据，在训练期间，仅保留图像分辨率高于 448×448 的样本以确保生成质量。更多细节见补充材料。

items.en: Training Objective. We use the same unified generative pretraining objective to adapt to diverse generation tasks in context. Specifically, a training sample for generation is formulated as: “<s>A photo of <p>a man</p><coor>image embedding of object localization image</coor>[IMG]image embedding of man[/IMG]sitting next to <p>a dog</p><coor>image embedding of object localization image</coor>[IMG]image embedding of dog[/IMG][IMG]image embedding of the whole image[/IMG]</s>”. We represent the coordinates of each object directly in image form by drawing the bounding box of each object at its specified location on a black image. Our Emu2-Gen conducts unified multimodal modeling of the text, object image, and corresponding object localization image. The regression loss only applies to the visual embeddings of the last image. We freeze the Visual Encoder during fine-tuning. We randomly drop tokens of entities and object localization image to enhance model adaptability and robustness. Additionally, we apply data augmentation to each object image, incorporating random background variations and random crop, aiming to reduce the reliance on image backgrounds.
items.zh:
训练目标。我们使用相同的统一生成预训练目标来适应上下文中多样的生成任务。具体来说，用于生成的训练样本格式为：“A photo of

a man

image embedding of object localization image[IMG]image embedding of man[/IMG]sitting next to

a dog

image embedding of object localization image[IMG]image embedding of dog[/IMG][IMG]image embedding of the whole image[/IMG]”。我们通过在每个对象的指定位置在黑色图像上绘制其边界框，以图像形式直接表示每个对象的坐标。我们的 Emu2-Gen 对文本、对象图像和相应的对象定位图像进行统一多模态建模。回归损失仅应用于最后一张图像的视觉嵌入。我们在微调期间冻结视觉编码器。我们随机丢弃实体和对象定位图像的标记以增强模型的适应性和鲁棒性。此外，我们对每个对象图像应用数据增强，包括随机背景变化和随机裁剪，旨在减少对图像背景的依赖。

items.en: Training Setup. We use a global batch size of 4,096 and train for 3k steps. The learning rate linearly warms up to 5×10−55superscript1055\times 10^{-5} in the first 100 steps, then decays to zero with a cosine schedule. We further fine-tune for 900 steps using the 500k high-quality pairs with a batch size of 2048.
items.zh: 训练设置。我们使用全局批次大小为 4096，训练 3k 步。学习率在前 100 步线性预热至 5×10⁻⁵，然后通过余弦调度衰减至零。我们使用 50 万对高质量数据进一步微调 900 步，批次大小为 2048。

items.en: We evaluate zero-shot and few-shot abilities of Emu2 on OKVQA [54], VQAv2 [29], VizWiz [30], TextVQA [69], and HatefulMemes [36] tasks. Details of the datasets and prompts can be found in supplementary materials. The results are presented in Table 1. Emu2 demonstrates remarkable in-context ability, showcasing improved performance with more in-context samples seen. Specifically, on VQAv2, VizWiz and TextVQA datasets, Emu2 outperforms Flamingo-80B and IDEFICS-80B under all few-shot settings with a much smaller model scale (37B).
items.zh: 我们在 OKVQA [54]、VQAv2 [29]、VizWiz [30]、TextVQA [69] 和 HatefulMemes [36] 任务上评估 Emu2 的零样本和少样本能力。数据集和提示的详细信息见补充材料。结果如表 1 所示。Emu2 展示了显著的上下文能力，随着看到的上下文样本增多，性能有所提升。具体来说，在 VQAv2、VizWiz 和 TextVQA 数据集上，Emu2 在所有少样本设置下均以更小的模型规模（37B）优于 Flamingo-80B 和 IDEFICS-80B。

items.en: Our Emu2-Chat is evaluated on academic-task-oriented benchmarks including image question-answering datasets (VQAv2 [29], OKVQA [54], GQA [33], VizWiz [30], TextVQA [69]) and video question-answering datasets (MSVD [83] and MSRVTT [83]). The evaluation also encompassed recent benchmarks for large multimodal models, including SEED-Bench [40], MM-Vet [89], TouchStone [7] and MMMU [90]. When evaluated on SEED-Bench, we followed the setup of LLaVa-1.5 [49] by presenting options to the model for completing multiple-choice tasks.
items.zh: 我们的 Emu2-Chat 在学术任务导向基准上进行评估，包括图像问答数据集（VQAv2 [29]、OKVQA [54]、GQA [33]、VizWiz [30]、TextVQA [69]）和视频问答数据集（MSVD [83] 和 MSRVTT [83]）。评估还包括近期的大规模多模态模型基准，包括 SEED-Bench [40]、MM-Vet [89]、TouchStone [7] 和 MMMU [90]。在 SEED-Bench 上评估时，我们遵循 LLaVa-1.5 [49] 的设置，向模型提供选项以完成多项选择任务。

items.en: As shown in Table 2, Emu2-Chat consistently outperforms other models in image question-answering tasks, encompassing well-established benchmarks like VQAv2 and GQA. Notably, it shows a noticeable improvement in the OKVQA task, which requires the utilization of external knowledge, showcasing the advantage of our model for mastering real-world knowledge. When it comes to video question-answering, Emu2-Chat demonstrated advantages even though it did not use video question-answering data for training. It achieved an accuracy of 49.0 and 31.4 on the MSVD-QA and MSRVTT-QA tasks, respectively, surpassing InstructBLIP, Emu, and the larger Flamingo-80B. More importantly, our model has also achieved better results on LMM benchmarks. LMM benchmarks such as MM-Vet provide a more comprehensive evaluation of model abilities, including solving complicated tasks. Emu2-Chat achieves a score of 48.5 in MM-Vet and 703.8 in TouchStone, confirming its superior capability in understanding and solving multimodal problems compared to existing models.
items.zh: 如表 2 所示，Emu2-Chat 在图像问答任务中持续优于其他模型，包括 VQAv2 和 GQA 等成熟基准。值得注意的是，在需要利用外部知识的 OKVQA 任务上，它显示出显著改进，展示了我们的模型在掌握现实世界知识方面的优势。在视频问答方面，Emu2-Chat 即使没有使用视频问答数据进行训练，也表现出优势。它在 MSVD-QA 和 MSRVTT-QA 任务上分别达到了 49.0 和 31.4 的准确率，超过了 InstructBLIP、Emu 和更大的 Flamingo-80B。更重要的是，我们的模型在 LMM 基准上也取得了更好的结果。诸如 MM-Vet 之类的 LMM 基准提供了对模型能力的更全面评估，包括解决复杂任务。Emu2-Chat 在 MM-Vet 上得分为 48.5，在 TouchStone 上得分为 703.8，证实了其与现有模型相比在理解和解决多模态问题方面的卓越能力。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Visualization of Emu2-Gen’s controllable generation capability. The model is capable of accepting a mix of text, locations and images as input, and generating images in context. The presented examples include text- and subject-grounded generation, stylization, multi-entity composition, subject-driven editing, and text-to-image generation.
items.capZh: 图 4：Emu2-Gen 可控生成能力的可视化。该模型能够接受文本、位置和图像的混合输入，并在上下文中生成图像。展示的示例包括文本和主体基础生成、风格化、多实体组合、主体驱动编辑和文本到图像生成。

items.en: Qualitative Results. Figure 3 presents a visualization of Emu2’s autoencoding results. With Emu2’s Visual Encoder and Visual Decoder, we can tokenize an image into visual embeddings and detokenize them back. Compared with SEED [28] and Emu [72], Emu2 shows significantly superior results. We also evaluate our image autoencoding results on MS-COCO [48] and achieve a strong 0.907 CLIP-I [60] score. More results are in the supplementary.
items.zh: 定性结果。图 3 展示了 Emu2 自编码结果的可视化。借助 Emu2 的视觉编码器和视觉解码器，我们可以将图像标记化为视觉嵌入，并将其解码回图像。与 SEED [28] 和 Emu [72] 相比，Emu2 显示出显著更优的结果。我们还在 MS-COCO [48] 上评估了图像自编码结果，取得了强大的 0.907 CLIP-I [60] 分数。更多结果见补充材料。

items.en: As depicted in Figure 4, Emu2-Gen is capable of accepting a mixture of text, locations and images as input, and generating images in context. The model skillfully engages in various controllable visual generation tasks in a zero-shot setting, capitalizing on the in-context learning capabilities in multimodality. Examples in Figure 4 show generated images of three dogs conditioned on different subjects, locations and scenarios. The presented visual samples demonstrate the model’s proficiency in tasks such as re-contextualization, stylization, modification, region-controllable generation, and multi-entity composition.
items.zh: 如图 4 所示，Emu2-Gen 能够接受文本、位置和图像的混合输入，并在上下文中生成图像。该模型在零样本设置下熟练地参与各种可控视觉生成任务，利用了多模态中的上下文学习能力。图 4 中的示例展示了基于不同主体、位置和场景生成的三只狗的图像。呈现的视觉样本展示了模型在重新上下文化、风格化、修改、区域可控生成和多实体组合等任务中的能力。

items.en: Zero-shot Text-to-image Generation. We evaluate the zero-shot text-to-image generation capability on 30k randomly sampled data from the MS-COCO [48] validation set. We employ CLIP-ViT-B [61], following the approach in DALL-E 3[10], to calculate the CLIP-T score to assess prompt-following ability. Additionally, we utilize CLIP-ViT-L, as in GILL[38], to compute the CLIP-I score for measuring image similarity. A higher score means the generated image is more similar to the prompt or the real image. Table 3 shows that Emu2-Gen achieves the state-of-the-art performance in terms of both CLIP-I and CLIP-T scores compared to various unimodal generation models and multimodal models. More text-to-image generation cases can be found in supplementary.
items.zh: 零样本文本到图像生成。我们在从 MS-COCO [48] 验证集中随机采样的 30k 数据上评估零样本文本到图像生成能力。我们使用 CLIP-ViT-B [61]，遵循 DALL-E 3 [10] 的方法，计算 CLIP-T 分数以评估提示跟随能力。此外，我们使用 CLIP-ViT-L，如 GILL [38] 中那样，计算 CLIP-I 分数以衡量图像相似度。分数越高表示生成的图像与提示或真实图像越相似。表 3 显示，与各种单模态生成模型和多模态模型相比，Emu2-Gen 在 CLIP-I 和 CLIP-T 分数方面均达到了最先进的性能。更多文本到图像生成案例见补充材料。

items.en: Zero-shot Subject-driven Generation. Following Kosmos-G [57], we also evaluate our model’s subject-driven image editing ability on DreamBench [64]. We generate four images for each prompt, resulting in a total of 3,000 images for a comprehensive evaluation. We employ DINO [13] and CLIP-I [60] to evaluate subject fidelity, and CLIP-T [60] to evaluate text fidelity, aligning with the methodology established by DreamBooth. Notably, Emu2-Gen excels in subject fidelity, as evidenced by its superior performance on DINO and CLIP-I metrics compared to methods like BLIP-Diffusion and Kosmos-G. Emu2-Gen impressively reconstructs subjects with just one image input in zero-shot setting, demonstrating superior subject fidelity through powerful visual decoding. Further illustrative cases are provided in the supplementary, showcasing Emu2-Gen’s proficiency in multi-entity generation.
items.zh: 零样本主体驱动生成。遵循 Kosmos-G [57]，我们还在 DreamBench [64] 上评估了模型的主体驱动图像编辑能力。我们为每个提示生成四张图像，总共 3000 张图像进行全面评估。我们使用 DINO [13] 和 CLIP-I [60] 评估主体保真度，使用 CLIP-T [60] 评估文本保真度，与 DreamBooth 建立的方法一致。值得注意的是，Emu2-Gen 在主体保真度方面表现出色，在 DINO 和 CLIP-I 指标上优于 BLIP-Diffusion 和 Kosmos-G 等方法。Emu2-Gen 在零样本设置下仅通过一张图像输入就能令人印象深刻地重建主体，通过强大的视觉解码展示了卓越的主体保真度。补充材料中提供了更多说明性案例，展示了 Emu2-Gen 在多实体生成方面的能力。

items.en: Large Multimodal Models. Recent years have witnessed the rapid growth of large multimodal models [5, 20, 32, 72]. CLIP [60] has pioneered the learning of large multimodal models with a contrastive learning objective on massive image-text pair data, yielding impressive zero-shot performance on image classification tasks. The BEiT series [9, 76] re-imagines visual signals as discrete tokens, allowing for language-model-like pretraining. Flamingo [5] and Kosmos series [32, 58] exhibit promising zero-shot and few-shot multi-modal understanding performance by pretraining on large-scale image-text interleaved data. With the remarkable progress in LLM and its open sourcing, connecting pre-trained vision backbones with LLMs with image-text pairs [43] or visual instruction tuning data [50] becomes a popular solution to efficiently learning large multimodal models. BLIP series [44, 43], LLaVA [50] and MiniGPT4 [95] show promising results by connecting vision encoders and LLMs with a small intermediate model. A school of successive efforts [85, 91, 70, 92, 77] further improves visual instruction tuning with better overall training pipelines [6, 41], grounding annotations [16, 93, 15, 86], and extra tasks [6]. There are early studies on training more unified large multimodal models [72, 87, 28, 24] that are capable of performing multimodal understanding and generation simultaneously. In this paper, we further explore the distinct solution proposed in Emu [72]: learning large multimodal models with generative objectives on both texts and images. By further scaling up generative multimodal models, we demonstrate promising in-context learning abilities like those of LLMs on both text and image generation tasks.
items.zh: 大规模多模态模型。近年来，大规模多模态模型 [5, 20, 32, 72] 迅速发展。CLIP [60] 率先通过对比学习目标在大量图像-文本对数据上学习大规模多模态模型，在图像分类任务上取得了令人印象深刻的零样本性能。BEiT 系列 [9, 76] 将视觉信号重新构想为离散标记，允许类似语言模型的预训练。Flamingo [5] 和 Kosmos 系列 [32, 58] 通过在大规模图像-文本交错数据上进行预训练，展示了有前景的零样本和少样本多模态理解性能。随着 LLM 的显著进步和开源，将预训练的视觉骨干与 LLM 通过图像-文本对 [43] 或视觉指令微调数据 [50] 连接起来，成为高效学习大规模多模态模型的流行解决方案。BLIP 系列 [44, 43]、LLaVA [50] 和 MiniGPT4 [95] 通过使用小型中间模型连接视觉编码器和 LLM 展示了有前景的结果。一系列后续工作 [85, 91, 70, 92, 77] 通过更好的整体训练流程 [6, 41]、基础标注 [16, 93, 15, 86] 和额外任务 [6] 进一步改进了视觉指令微调。早期有研究训练更统一的大规模多模态模型 [72, 87, 28, 24]，能够同时执行多模态理解和生成。在本文中，我们进一步探索了 Emu [72] 中提出的独特解决方案：通过生成目标在文本和图像上学习大规模多模态模型。通过进一步扩展生成式多模态模型，我们展示了在文本和图像生成任务上类似 LLM 的有前景的上下文学习能力。

items.en: In-Context Learning. Recent advancements in large language models [12, 22] have underscored their capacity for in-context learning [12], where models leverage a few contextual examples to adapt to new tasks. This phenomenon, particularly evident as LLMs scale up in size and data, has been exploited for complex challenges such as mathematical reasoning [82], signaling new emergent ability in model behavior [81]. There are a few early attempts in in-context learning in the realm of vision and multimodality. Flamingo [5] integrates visual inputs to LLMs, enabling the in-context learning of visual-linguistic tasks such as image captioning and OCR through language-based interfacing. Painter [79] and SegGPT [80] conduct an early study of visual in-context learning. Inspired by the emerging abilities of large language models, in this work we study the problem of multimodal in-context learning by scaling up generative multimodal models and demonstrating strong results in broad understanding and generation tasks.
items.zh: 上下文学习。大型语言模型 [12, 22] 的最新进展强调了它们的上下文学习能力 [12]，即模型利用少量上下文示例适应新任务。这种现象在 LLM 规模和数据扩展时尤为明显，已被用于解决数学推理 [82] 等复杂挑战，标志着模型行为中新的涌现能力 [81]。在视觉和多模态领域，有一些早期的上下文学习尝试。Flamingo [5] 将视觉输入集成到 LLM 中，通过基于语言的接口实现视觉语言任务（如图像描述和 OCR）的上下文学习。Painter [79] 和 SegGPT [80] 进行了视觉上下文学习的早期研究。受大型语言模型涌现能力的启发，在这项工作中，我们通过扩展生成式多模态模型并展示在广泛理解和生成任务中的强大结果，研究了多模态上下文学习的问题。

full.secZh: 5 更广泛的影响与局限性

items.en: Large multimodal models offer a wide range of benefits to society, from enhancing visual navigation and medical diagnostics to increasing accessibility for individuals with visual impairment. The in-context learning capabilities of Emu2 allow it to quickly adapt to new tasks or environments, even with limited data, ushering in numerous potential applications. The generative capabilities of Emu2 can be highly valuable to the creative industries.
items.zh: 大规模多模态模型为社会带来了广泛的好处，从增强视觉导航和医疗诊断到增加视觉障碍人士的可访问性。Emu2 的上下文学习能力使其能够快速适应新任务或环境，即使数据有限，也带来了许多潜在应用。Emu2 的生成能力对创意产业可能非常有价值。

items.en: However, there are potential downsides in more powerful multimodal models to be considered. The hallucination issue of multimodal models may cause incorrect and unreasonable predictions in certain cases. Emu2 may also generate harmful or biased content like other generative models [56] since the training data may be biased or contain unsuitable content. We are actively working to enhance the robustness of multimodal models, reduce model hallucinations, improve the fairness of training data, and reduce toxic data. We also call on the wider community to pay attention to the potential social impact of multimodal models as they are growing larger and stronger.
items.zh: 然而，更强大的多模态模型也存在潜在的缺点需要考虑。多模态模型的幻觉问题可能导致在某些情况下出现不正确和不合理的预测。Emu2 也可能像其他生成模型 [56] 一样生成有害或有偏见的内容，因为训练数据可能存在偏见或包含不合适的内容。我们正在积极努力提高多模态模型的鲁棒性，减少模型幻觉，提高训练数据的公平性，并减少有毒数据。我们还呼吁更广泛的社区关注多模态模型在变得越来越大和越来越强时潜在的社会影响。

items.en: One of the limitations of Emu2 is that its in-context learning capability could fail in some complex scenes or tasks, e.g., counting in a crowd. Additionally, there is still a gap between Emu2’s question-answering capability and that of closed multimodal systems. For example, GPT-4V achieves 67.7 MM-Vet score vs. Emu2’s 48.5, although already being state-of-the-art among public models. We believe there is much room to improve as the quality and quantity of training data improve and as model scale continues to grow.
items.zh: Emu2 的局限性之一是，其上下文学习能力在某些复杂场景或任务中可能失败，例如人群计数。此外，Emu2 的问答能力与封闭多模态系统之间仍存在差距。例如，GPT-4V 的 MM-Vet 得分为 67.7，而 Emu2 为 48.5，尽管 Emu2 在公开模型中已经是最先进的。我们相信，随着训练数据质量和数量的提高以及模型规模的持续增长，还有很大的改进空间。

items.en: We present a 37 billion-parameter generative multimodal model Emu2 that shows strong performance and versatility on many multimodal tasks in the in-context settings. Emu2 serves as a base model and a general-purpose interface for a variety of multimodal tasks. We demonstrate state-of-the-art results on a broad range of benchmarks of multimodal understanding and generation. Specifically, our model largely surpasses prior work on the lately proposed LMM benchmarks that require more advanced capability compared to classic academic benchmarks. Emu2 also shows remarkable capability of controllable visual generation in multimodal context, e.g., subject-/text-grounded generation. Additionally, we review the limitations and broader social impact of Emu2. Despite discussed weaknesses, these results suggest that generative multimodal model at scale may be an important step towards the development of adaptable, general multimodal systems.
items.zh: 我们提出了一个370亿参数的生成式多模态模型Emu2，该模型在上下文设置下的许多多模态任务中展现出强大的性能和多功能性。Emu2作为基础模型和通用接口，适用于多种多模态任务。我们在多模态理解和生成的广泛基准测试中展示了最先进的结果。具体而言，与经典学术基准相比，我们的模型在近期提出的需要更高级能力的LMM基准测试上大幅超越了先前工作。Emu2在多模态上下文中还展现出卓越的可控视觉生成能力，例如基于主题/文本的生成。此外，我们回顾了Emu2的局限性和更广泛的社会影响。尽管存在讨论的弱点，这些结果表明，大规模生成式多模态模型可能是向开发适应性强的通用多模态系统迈出的重要一步。
